---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report with a clear description of what is broken and where it happens
title: ''
labels: bug, good first issue
assignees: evokoa-admin
type: Bug

---

## Bug Report: [Short summary of the issue]
### To Reproduce
1. Go to: `[URL/path in docs site]`
2. Perform this action: `[click "..." ]`
3. Navigate to: `[section/component]`
4. Observe: `[error / wrong content / broken layout]`

### Expected Behavior
What should happen.

### Actual Behavior
What actually happens (including error text if any).

### Impact
- Severity: High / Medium / Low  
- User impact: [e.g., blocks setup, incorrect documentation output, missing guidance]

### Evidence
- Attach screenshots / short video / console output
- Include related page links and file references if known:
  - `page URL`
  - `docs/...` file path

### Desktop Environment
- OS: `[e.g., macOS 14.4, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]`
- Browser: `[e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari]`
- Version: `[e.g., 124.0]`

### Additional Context
- Area: `[Docs section, API reference, tutorial, etc.]`
- Reproducibility: `[Always / Intermittent]`
- Local setup: `[Node version, pnpm/npm/yarn version, command used to run docs]`
